text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we're training for the autumn
Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Brian! Although, something about her
expression seems different...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She's so close to breaking the record for the most
G1 wins! To think a racer like this would be born
in our generation!

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text: Hold on a second! Where did you hear that?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, so noisy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's training is open to the public, so the
stands are packed with both fans and press.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The press especially seem restless. We're catching
more of their chatter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, really?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, looks that way. When I heard that, I
couldn't help but agree Brian has it in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Press
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hm... From what I gather, it's about the upcoming
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll be there.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri's Fans
text_block_list.text: Ready, and... Oguriiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
C-come on... It's a little embarrassing being called
that at school...

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
W-what's happening? Are we gonna see all the
big names together at the autumn Tenno Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta ask them about it! Over here, Oguri
Cap! Why did you decide to enter?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Because I want to add the autumn Tenno Sho to
my list of achievements.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: And what about you, Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was told it's an essential race if I want to get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh... So you're racing in it for strength?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: In that case, I definitely won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What was it you said at the URA award
ceremony? You want a battle for the top, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What of it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One of my goals is to win the autumn Tenno Sho
too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow competitor and someone also seeking
strength, I won't hand it over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That sounded like a Oguri Cap is officially
declaring a rivalry! Does this spell disaster for
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
It's guaranteed to be a heated race! This year's
autumn Tenno Sho is sure going to be a wild one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I wasn't expecting to be so restricted.
choice_data_list: All eyes are on you now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So this is the autumn Tenno Sho, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Besides this, what are the other
races in the Senior Autumn Triple Crown?
choice_data_list: Apart from the autumn Tenno Sho, there's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup and the Arima Kinen—both are
considerably famous races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All right then, I'd like you to register me for those
as well.
choice_data_list: You want to run in all of them?
You want to run in all of them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One of my goals is to win the autumn Tenno Sho
too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow competitor and someone also seeking
strength, I won't hand it over.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Despite being such a big player, she still
only calls herself a competitor.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Then I want to answer accordingly, no matter
what awaits me there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll make up for today's shortcomings. The rest is
up to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that said, Narita Brian starts running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she can't contain herself anymore. I pull
out my stopwatch to time her, when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hey. Is it true?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Is Brian really set to compete in the Senior
Autumn Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then it might not be too late to make the end of
the year...
choice_data_list: Not too late for what exactly?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I mean for myself. I sincerely wish both of
you the best of luck.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And if everything goes well, it will be so for all of
us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Senior Autumn Triple Crown is set to start
with the autumn Tenno Sho. But just around the
corner, a great disturbance grows closer.
